name: Soup Provencale
recipeIngredient: 1 large Potato, scrubbed and cut into cubes
4 tbsp Shoyu, or miso to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Smash each clove of garlic with the handle of a knife to make removing the skin easier. Remove the skin and chop the garlic.
2. Heat the oils in a heavy kettle; add onion and garlic.
3. Saute over very low heat for about 20 minutes or until well cooked.
4. Add water, potato, bay leaves, and thyme. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the potato is tender.
5. Remove from the heat and stir in shoyu or miso. Then add cayenne to taste.
6. Serve with a hot, crusty loaf of whole grain bread (preferably sourdough) and a big green salad.
